- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created file in .github)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (User provided Flutter Web + Firebase + Riverpod + go_router requirements)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Ran `flutter create . --platforms=web`)

- [x] Customize the Project (Implemented admin routes, Firebase services, pages, and responsive layout)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No additional extensions required)

- [x] Compile the Project (Ran `flutter pub get` and `flutter analyze`)

- [x] Create and Run Task (No VS Code task needed for Flutter run/build)

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated and HTML comments removed)
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
